title: Nursing Students' Knowledge, Attitudes, and Skills Related to Perinatal Substance Use.
summary: Substance use in the perinatal period is a critical public health issue in the United States. Nurses play a significant role in promoting positive maternal-infant health outcomes for women who use substances in the perinatal period. However, many nurses have deficient knowledge, skills, and attitude...

title: Generative AI Podcasts for Learning: Perceptions of Faculty and Graduate Nursing Students.
summary: In nursing education, faculty generated and commercially prepared podcasts have been shown to be an effective way to deliver content. Generative artificial intelligence (GAI) technology can be used to create human-like podcast audio recordings using evidence-based resources chosen by faculty....
